name: Spinach and Artichoke Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 package Artichoke hearts, frozen (9 oz), defrosted OR:
1 package Chopped spinach, frozen (10 oz), defrosted
1/3 cup Parmesan or romano cheese - fresh grated
recipeInstructions:
1. If using frozen artichokes, cook according to package instructions. Do not overcook.
2. Drain the artichokes and place them at the bottom of a 3-quart casserole dish.
3. Squeeze as much moisture out of the spinach as possible, then layer it on top of the artichokes.
4. In an electric mixer, blend the cream cheese, mayonnaise, and butter or oil until light and fluffy.
5. Gradually beat in the milk, then spread the mixture over the top of the spinach.
6. Sprinkle with pepper and the grated cheese.
7. Bake, uncovered, at 375°F for 40 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
8. You can refrigerate the dish after assembly but before baking; if chilled, slightly increase the baking time.
